/usr/bin/g++  -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/calcDist.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/countryDistribution.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/findHap.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/hapNetAll.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/hapNetDirected.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/main_siteMask.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/networkAnalysis.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/opt.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/output.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/writeJson.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/compare/compare.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/IO/anaMetaMut.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/IO/readMeta_acc2line_hash.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/IO/readMetadata.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/IO/readMut_acc2line_hash.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/IO/readMutations.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/IO/show_all.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/struct/edges.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/struct/haplotype.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/struct/mutation.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/struct/virus.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/tool/calcDate.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/tool/chomp.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/tool/emptyStr.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/tool/findSubstr.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/tool/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/tool/unionFind.c.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/tool/optionparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/vcf2mut.cpp.o CMakeFiles/McAN.dir/src/calcDist_thread.cpp.o -o McAN  -lm hashmap/libhashmap.a cJSON/libcjson.a -lpthread -lm
